name: Mince-Meat Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs, molasses, sweetened condensed milk, water, and mince meat to the creamed mixture. Mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, salt, baking powder. Gradually add this dry mixture to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Fold in rolled oats.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 410°F (205°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly golden and edges are set.
6 servings.
